sections.title: Lunch And Dinner Menu
items: Allergen Note
Please inform a manager or Chef's Assistant prior to ordering if someone in your party requires special dietary accommodations
Gluten-free buns are available upon request.
Preposterous Poke Noodle*(DS, PS, SFS, TNS)-
Preposterous Poke Noodle*
poke bowl with spicy mayo, blue rice noodles, edamame salad, cucumbers and lotus root
Magician Meatball Cone(ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)-
Magician Meatball Cone
home-made meatballs and marinara cavatappi, served in a garlic bread cone
Roast Beast Bacon Burger(FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)-
Roast Beast Bacon Burger
bacon cheeseburger with caramelized onion aioli, tomato and lettuce within a brioche bun and served with crinkle cut fries
Meat-za Pizza Burger(FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)-
Meat-za Pizza Burger
pizza-inspired burger topped with salami, pepperoni, mozzarella cheese, within a brioche bun, topped with a mozzarella stick and served with crinkle cut fries
Cluck-A-Doodle Waffle Toodle(FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)-
Cluck-A-Doodle Waffle Toodle
hand breaded chicken tenders served with a fluffy waffle, crinkle cut fries and mustard mayo BBQ sauce
Marvelous Miso Salmon(DS, PS, SFS, TNS)-
Marvelous Miso Salmon
miso salmon topped with gochujang sauce, accompanied by quinoa with vegetables, edamame puree and cucumber relish
Vegan Magician Meatball Cone(DS, ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS, VG)-
Vegan Magician Meatball Cone
plant based Gardein™ meatballs and marinara cavatappi, served in a garlic bread cone
Tamed Dragon Salad(DS, ES, FS, GS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, VG)-
Tamed Dragon Salad
red dragon fruit, red quinoa, raspberries, mandarin oranges, almonds, baby spinach, cucumber, and guava vinaigrette
Slice-a-roni Pepperoni(ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)-
Slice-a-roni Pepperoni
artisan crust pizza, char cup pepperoni, tangy tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese with crinkle cut fries
Cheese on the Flying Trapeze(ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS, V)-
Cheese on the Flying Trapeze
artisan crust pizza, tangy tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, crinkle cut fries
Cheesy Crunch Pretzel Dog(FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)-
Cheesy Crunch Pretzel Dog
1/3 pound all beef hot dog, Fritos® Honey BBQ Twists, cheddar cheese sauce, jalapeño relish, BBQ mayo, with crinkle cut fries

Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup -
Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup

Enjoy more than 100 drink choices and refills thru the day* with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® souvenir cup. Get 3–6 souvenir cups for each, 2 for each, or 1 for at participating Coca-Cola Freestyle® locations. *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are limited to no more than one (1) pour from the Coca-Cola Freestyle® machine per 10 minutes and valid day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.
